question: Can the exact replay-validated Family A Option C rule be expressed using runtime-available signals only?
final_verdict_rationale: Three of six documented combo gates (ocr_qty_eq_1, hybrid_h_qty_2_stable, undiscounted_blank_desc as replayed) have no exact runtime equivalent. The proposed conservative proxy rule diverges from documented rule on Rolo run 7 (1 FP when stability omitted and supplier threaded). Exact documented rule cannot be implemented without investigation artifacts.

signal_inventory.proxy_needed: Inflation signature cluster (qty=2 + hasInconsistentGrossLineTotal + unit≈total) OR drop gate
signal_inventory.precision_loss: Omits Acqua-style column-faithful qty=2 (blocked by unit≈total); cannot distinguish OCR=1.35 Gorgonzola without discount/supplier gates; 11/15 effective-paid rows lack passc OCR baseline
signal_inventory.production_path: Not preserved — single quantity from Pass C GPT only (invoice-table-extraction.ts L383-401)
MonetaryLineItem.quantity from GPT JSON → bindMonetaryColumns input unchanged → invoice_items.quantity

signal_inventory.precision_loss: 1 documented FP on Rolo transient run 7 when omitted (sensitivity-result.json omit_hybrid_h_qty_2_stable)
signal_inventory.production_path: Not computed — requires multi-run stability audit (.tmp/final-stability-audit/)

signal_inventory.proxy_needed: discount_pct == null || discount_pct === 0 at bindMonetaryColumns input
signal_inventory.precision_loss: Pass C discount_pct available pre-monetaryToInvoiceLineItem but stripped before persist; proxy untested vs visible DESC audit for full population; Pomodori requires discount_pct=20 not null
signal_inventory.production_path: GPT JSON discount_pct → parseMonetaryLineItems L38 → stripped at monetaryToInvoiceLineItem L219-226
Computed from unit_price + total on MonetaryLineItem at bindMonetaryColumns input

signal_inventory.precision_loss: Pass B supplier not currently threaded into bindMonetaryColumns (invoice-table-extraction.ts L401); available on index.ts response and invoices.supplier after persist
signal_inventory.production_path: Pass B extractMetadataFromImage → index.ts response supplier field

signal_inventory.proxy_needed: Re-invoke bindMonetaryColumns internally at correction time (same function, not stored signal)
signal_inventory.precision_loss: Not emitted or logged in production; depends on gross unit_price surviving to bind input
signal_inventory.production_path: applyEffectivePaidPrice in bindRow L206 — delta computable by comparing pre/post bind unit_price

signal_inventory.proxy_needed: Same as binding_changed — derived at bindMonetaryColumns
signal_inventory.production_path: Post-bind qty×unit_price vs total check in replayBinding

signal_inventory.precision_loss: Gorgonzola effective-paid diff_pct=34.25% blocked only by threshold; threshold drift to ≤0.30 would widen blast radius (combo-stress-result.json)

signal_inventory.proxy_needed: Composite of binding replay signals + qty>1 at bindMonetaryColumns
signal_inventory.precision_loss: Exact composite expressible at bind time if discount_pct and supplier threaded; not equivalent to full documented combo without dropped gates
signal_inventory.production_path: Not computed in production today; recomputable from bindMonetaryColumns inputs

proxy_rule_definition.trigger: quantity===2 AND (discount_pct==null||0) AND supplier IL BOCCONCINO AND unit≈total AND qty_inflation_signature
